notes: Specifications aggregated from multiple secondary sources (bluesquare.digital, screenmoove.com, ManualsLib QM43B/QM65B user manual, LDLC.com, manua.ls). Samsung's official DisplaySolutions product page redirects; US business support page lists no specs. HDMI 2.0 and DP 1.2 grades confirmed by multiple retailers. RS232C uses Samsung Ex-Link 3.5mm TRS jacks (confirmed by Samsung RS232 documentation). Ethernet is 10/100 Mbps per manual (Cat7 STP recommended). Power connector is NEMA 5-15 captive cord for US market; other regions may differ. Audio Out and RS232C share the 3.5mm TRS connector form factor but are separate physical ports. DVI input is listed for the broader QM-B product family in some documentation but not confirmed for QM65B specifically — omitted here. Built-in speakers (10W+10W) are present but have no physical external connector.

ports.name: RS232C In
ports.note: Samsung Ex-Link 3.5mm TRS stereo jack; RS-232 serial control via adapter

ports.name: RS232C Out
ports.note: Samsung Ex-Link 3.5mm TRS stereo jack; daisy-chain RS-232 out via adapter

ports.name: AC In
ports.note: Internal PSU; AC 100–240V 50/60Hz; captive power cord on US model
